strengths: Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) at re:cinq
Strong full-stack engineering background with multi-language fluency (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Java, Swift)
Proven entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform for NGOs)
concerns: No explicit AI strategy or product development experience mentioned (e.g., no ML models, AI platforms, or AI-driven products built)
Master's/PhD in AI-related field is missing (only a Bachelor's in Computer Science)
Limited evidence of advising customers/partners on AI technologies (resume focuses on internal engineering roles)
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and has strong cloud/AI-adjacent engineering skills (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq), but lacks direct evidence of AI strategy, AI product development, or customer advisory roles in AI. The entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is a plus but not directly relevant to AI strategy. The absence of an advanced AI-related degree further weakens the fit for this role.
